industries.title: Oil & Gas
industries.description: Engineered sealing solutions for lethal, high-pressure, high-temperature applications handling toxic hydrocarbons across midstream and downstream operations
industries.fullDescription: The oil and gas industry demands sealing solutions that can withstand extreme pressures, temperatures, and corrosive environments. Inmarco provides comprehensive sealing products for upstream exploration and production, midstream transportation and storage, and downstream refining operations.
challenges: Exposure to corrosive hydrocarbons and chemicals
Strict environmental regulations for fugitive emissions
Remote offshore locations requiring reliable performance
solutions: High-temperature graphite packing for process valves
PTFE compression packing for pump applications
Spiral wound gaskets for flange connections

industries.title: Power Generation
industries.description: Mission-critical sealing solutions ensuring uninterrupted power delivery under extreme thermal and mechanical stress
industries.fullDescription: Power generation facilities require sealing solutions that deliver uninterrupted performance under extreme thermal and mechanical stress. From coal-fired plants to combined-cycle gas turbines and nuclear facilities, Inmarco offers proven sealing technologies for critical rotating and static equipment.
solutions: Flexible graphite packing for steam valves

industries.title: Chemical
industries.description: Comprehensive range of chemically-resistant packing and gaskets engineered for aggressive acids, caustics, and corrosive process environments
industries.fullDescription: Chemical processing facilities require sealing materials with exceptional chemical resistance and reliability. Inmarco delivers comprehensive sealing solutions for handling acids, bases, solvents, and aggressive chemicals across batch and continuous process operations.
challenges: Wide range of chemical compatibility requirements
Varying pH levels from highly acidic to caustic

industries.title: Water & Wastewater Treatment
industries.description: Reliable sealing solutions for water treatment and wastewater management systems
industries.fullDescription: Water and wastewater treatment facilities require sealing solutions that resist chemical exposure, maintain hygiene standards, and deliver long-term reliability. Inmarco provides comprehensive sealing products for pumps, valves, filtration systems, and treatment equipment.

industries.title: Marine
industries.description: High-performance sealing solutions for stern tubes, rudder posts, and critical seawater applications in marine vessels
industries.fullDescription: Marine environments present unique sealing challenges with constant exposure to saltwater, humidity, and demanding operational conditions. Inmarco provides corrosion-resistant sealing solutions for naval vessels, commercial ships, offshore platforms, and marine infrastructure.

industries.title: Cement
industries.description: Heavy-duty, abrasion-resistant sealing solutions engineered for extreme kiln temperatures and harsh cement manufacturing environments
industries.fullDescription: Cement manufacturing involves extreme temperatures, abrasive materials, and dusty environments that challenge sealing performance. Inmarco offers robust sealing solutions designed for kiln operations, grinding mills, conveyor systems, and processing equipment in cement plants.

industries.title: Fertilizers
industries.description: Specialized sealing solutions for high-pressure ammonia synthesis reactors, corrosive acid handling, and aggressive urea production environments
industries.fullDescription: Fertilizer production involves handling ammonia, acids, and other aggressive chemicals at high temperatures and pressures. Inmarco provides specialized sealing solutions for ammonia plants, phosphate processing, and NPK fertilizer production facilities.

industries.title: Metallurgy
industries.description: Durable sealing and thermal insulation solutions for blast furnaces, molten metal handling, and extreme high-temperature steel production environments
industries.fullDescription: Metallurgical operations expose sealing materials to some of the harshest conditions in industrial processing. Inmarco specializes in sealing solutions engineered to withstand molten metals, extreme temperatures, abrasive materials, and corrosive atmospheres in steel mills, foundries, and metal processing facilities.
challenges: Exposure to molten metals and slag
solutions: Reinforced graphite packing for high temperature

industries.title: Pulp & Paper
industries.description: High-performance sealing solutions for abrasive chemical slurries, corrosive bleach applications, and harsh pulp production environments
industries.fullDescription: Pulp and paper mills require sealing solutions that resist aggressive chemicals, handle high temperatures, and perform reliably in wet, humid conditions. Inmarco delivers sealing products for digesters, bleaching systems, papermaking machines, and auxiliary equipment.
challenges: Exposure to caustic chemicals and bleaches

industries.title: Food & Pharmaceutical
industries.description: FDA-compliant, sealing solutions ensuring zero product contamination - for sterile pharmaceutical and food-grade processing applications
industries.fullDescription: Food processing and pharmaceutical manufacturing demand the highest standards of hygiene, product purity, and regulatory compliance. Inmarco delivers FDA and EU compliant sealing solutions for processing, mixing, filling, and packaging equipment in both industries.

industries.title: Sugar
industries.description: High-performance, abrasion-resistant, non-contaminating food-grade sealing solutions for demanding sugar crushing, extraction, and refining operations
industries.fullDescription: Sugar processing and refining require food-safe sealing materials that maintain product purity while handling high temperatures, steam, and sugar solutions. Inmarco provides FDA-compliant sealing solutions for crushing, extraction, clarification, evaporation, and crystallization processes.

industries.title: OEM
industries.description: Next-generation fugitive emission packing and gasketing solutions, custom-engineered for original equipment manufacturers, exceeding international regulatory requirements
industries.fullDescription: Original Equipment Manufacturers require reliable sealing partners who understand design integration, performance specifications, and supply chain demands. Inmarco collaborates with OEMs to develop custom sealing solutions that enhance equipment performance and reliability.
